raw_consumer_statement:
it started on XX/XX/2025 where our card sent to me by Citibank was never delivered, but used at several places without our knowledge and consent. 

Citibank then sent another replacement card, and we never received it again. the replacement card was used at several places without our knowledge and consent. 

Citibank was advised not to send the replacement card via XXXX or XXXX trackable to ensure we receive the card and to further prevent it from going into the wrong hands. Citbank said yes, but instead sent us a replacement card using USPS, yet again and the card once again, like before was used at several places without our knowledge and consent. 

A police report ( CASE NUMBER XXXX XXXX ) was filed on the matter on XX/XX/2025 under the name of XXXX XXXX XXXX, my son who is an authorised user of the card that was used without our knowledge and consent. 

Citibank customer service is lackadaisical, careless and not willing to pay attention to the problem at hand, which is an intercepted mailbox and allowing the fraudulent charges to go through,
